arts.ttl: West Brom injury update as Tony Mowbray sweats on three players and fresh worry
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray is sweating on the availability of a host of West Bromwich Albion players ahead of what is a crucial fixture in the make up of their season, when they welcome Watford to The Hawthorns on Saturday. West Brom injury update as Tony Mowbray sweats on three players and fresh worry
